bird.name: Luzon bleeding-heart
bird.summary: The Luzon bleeding-heart, bleeding-heart dove, bleeding-heart pigeon or punay (Gallicolumba luzonica) is a species of ground dove in the ge…

relations.subject: Luzon bleeding-heart
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting for the pet trade and for meat
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Luzon bleeding-heart
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting for the pet trade and for meat
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Luzon bleeding-heart
relations.evidence: It is threatened by the destruction of its habitat through Illegal logging, conversion into farmlands through slash-and-burn and mining
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
